character: Jack — humanoid golden retriever, sharp navy two-button business suit, white dress shirt, navy tie, expressive amber eyes, anthropomorphic snout, upright bipedal, 2D adult-animation style, painterly flat shading
world: Open-plan SaaS office, late afternoon light through tall windows, dual-monitor desk with CRM dashboard visible, muted teal walls, dark wood floor
style_lock: Match the attached jack-reference.png exactly — fur color, jacket cut, tie pattern, snout proportions. Same illustration style across every still. No text or UI overlays on the character. Camera: medium shot unless beat says otherwise.

beats.prompt: Jack standing at his desk, hands flat on the desktop, head turned slightly toward camera, calm half-smile, eyes calculating. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Update on the Doug situation.

beats.prompt: Jack same pose, head tilted a couple degrees further toward camera, one eyebrow raised, jaw set. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Update on the Doug situation.

beats.prompt: Jack mid-gesture, right paw lifting an inch off the desk, eyes glancing down-left as if mid-recall. Medium shot.
beats.caption: I sent one follow-up email this morning.

beats.prompt: Jack standing upright now, both paws clasped at his belt, looking directly at camera, soft innocent expression. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Very normal.

beats.prompt: Jack same pose, one ear flicked back, the corner of his mouth twitches — the smallest tell. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Very ethical.

beats.prompt: Over-the-shoulder of Jack looking at his monitor. The CRM dashboard glows. We see the back of his suit jacket and one ear silhouetted against the screen.
beats.caption: Then the CRM lit up.

beats.prompt: Close-up of the monitor showing a notification: 'Email opened'. Jack's reflection faintly visible in the screen, eyes wide.
beats.caption: Email opened.

beats.prompt: Same close-up of the monitor, a second notification stacking: 'Link clicked'. Reflection of Jack's snout now leaning closer to the glass.
beats.caption: Link clicked.

beats.prompt: Same monitor, a third notification: 'Reply received'. Jack's reflection: ears now fully forward, pupils dilated. Soft cyan glow on his fur.
beats.caption: Reply received.

beats.prompt: Cut back to Jack standing at the desk, both paws still at his sides, but stiff. Mouth slightly open. Frozen for a beat.
beats.caption: Which means one of two things.

beats.prompt: Jack adjusting his tie with his right paw, confident smirk forming, eyes narrowing. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Either Doug is interested...

beats.prompt: Jack's hand still on the tie but smirk faltering, ears dropping a fraction, eyes flicking toward the monitor. Medium shot.
beats.caption: or Doug is tracking me back.

beats.prompt: Jack now turned three-quarters toward the monitor, paw mid-air gesturing at the screen, mouth open mid-sentence. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Can I prove that legally?

beats.prompt: Jack faces camera, paws spread palms-up at chest height, blank resigned expression. Medium shot.
beats.caption: No.

beats.prompt: Jack raising his right paw, one finger up, eyebrows lifted, head tilted philosophically. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Spiritually?

beats.prompt: Jack stepping a half-pace forward toward camera, both paws spread wide, eyes intense, an evangelical conviction in his stance. Medium-tight shot.
beats.caption: The evidence is overwhelming.

beats.prompt: Wide shot: Jack back at his desk, perfectly still, suit immaculate, staring straight ahead. The office around him feels very quiet.
beats.caption: So I'm staying calm.

beats.prompt: Same wide shot, Jack identical pose, but his right ear has flicked once. Otherwise frozen.
beats.caption: Making no sudden movements.

beats.prompt: Medium shot of Jack at the desk, his paw rests on the mouse, the monitor glow lighting half his face cyan. His other paw is curled tight at his side. Subtle tension.
beats.caption: And pretending this pipeline isn't negotiating with my nervous system.

beats.prompt: Jack turned fully to camera, hands clasped again, professional smile, eyes betray nothing. Medium shot.
beats.caption: Account management is mostly trust...

beats.prompt: Same framing, his smile slightly tighter, one ear flicked back. Medium shot.
beats.caption: ...timing...

beats.prompt: Medium shot: Jack standing very straight, both paws clasped at the front of his suit jacket, lips pressed thin, eyes wide, tail completely still — the visual equivalent of holding one's breath.
beats.caption: and quietly panicking...

beats.prompt: Same framing, head tilted a fraction, a single bead of sweat on his temple catching the light. Otherwise frozen. The suit still perfect.
beats.caption: ...in business clothes.
